'''Hallolar Voors''' was an entrepreneur on [[Jubilar/Legends|Jubilar]]. The son of a wealthy local businessman, Voors trafficked in [[Spice/Legends|spice]], and was apparently able to find a source of the substance independent of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], who controlled the spice trade in the local sector. In [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] put out a bounty on him to remove this competition; [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] accepted the contract and killed Voors with a deadly neural toxin under the guise of being a buyer.

==Appearances==
